content_fingerprint: openai s codex moves from chat interface to task automation producing real outputs openai has published new documentation positioning codex as a task automation and tool connection layer that moves beyond the chat paradigm to generate structured outputs such as documentation and dashboards openai s academy has published a pair of articles what is codex and how to get started with codex signaling a clearer public articulation of where codex sits in the company s product lineup the materials describe codex as a system that extends beyond chat based interactions to automate tasks connect tools an
